name: Moo Goo Gai Pan (Chinese Dish) #1214
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken by removing bones and skin, then cut into 1-inch slices.
2. Mix with salt and cornstarch.
3. Stir-fry in hot oil until the chicken turns white; about 2 minutes.
4. Add mushrooms, green pepper, water chestnuts, baby corn, and soy sauce to the pan.
5. Cook for an additional 4 minutes.
6. Add almonds.
7. Serve with hot rice.
